description: Add a notification center with persisted read state, unread indicators, filtering, and clearing read notifications.

userStories.title: Add notification read-state persistence
userStories.description: As a product team, I want notifications to persist read state per user so that read and unread status survives across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification storage tracks whether each notification is read for the current user
Persisted read state remains available when the user starts a new session
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend notification read-state update actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that the notification center reflects what I still need to review.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actions toggle a notification between read and unread states
Updated read state is returned consistently to notification queries
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend action to clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear read notifications so that old completed items no longer clutter my notification history.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear action removes or archives only notifications already marked read
Unread notifications remain available after a clear operation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread notification badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge so that I can see at a glance when new notifications need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Application chrome displays unread notification count badge when unread items exist
Unread badge count updates after read-state changes and clear actions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification center list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can review notifications from a dedicated center.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can open the notification center and see a list of notifications with current read state
Notification list reflects persisted read-state changes without stale rows
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read-state filter and clear-read controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state and clear read items so that I can focus on what still matters.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center offers All, Unread, and Read filters
Clear read control removes read items from the list after confirmation and refresh
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
